content_body: We were a group of 7 women that rented this beautiful property for a long weekend getaway. The view is spectacular and the house has a nice deck with dining table and a nice screened in porch on the lower level. We enjoyed having dinner and hanging out on the deck. The house is perfect with nice furnishings and decorations. We even loved all the artwork. The beds and pillows are comfy. The kitchen is fully stocked with anything you would need for cooking. Plenty of dishes, cups, glasses, wine glasses…. There is a kuerig and an auto drip coffee maker. The bathrooms even have nice liquid hand soap and shampoo. There are plenty of extra bath towels as well. It was the perfect weekend getaway!
title: Beautiful Mountain Getaway for a Girls Trip
